nasb.text: You, however, continue in the things you have learned and become convinced of, knowing from whom you have learned them,

esv.text: But as for you, continue in what you have learned and have firmly believed, knowing from whom you learned it

cnv.text: 你應當遵守所學和確信的；你知道是跟誰學的，

ccb.text: 但你要把自己所学的、所笃信的记在心里，因为你知道是跟谁学的，

csbs.text: 至于你，你当持守所学到、所确信的，因为你知道是从哪些人学的；
